summary: Lead accepts M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 after gameplay_designer REVIEW and systems_architect ACCEPT. The accepted artifact is a planning-only M7 Beta content-lock contract; it prepares but does not approve formal content lock, preserves M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and modifies only allowed process/status/task/message paths.

tests_run.result: Only allowed process/status/task/message paths changed before lead acceptance.

decisions: Do not treat this as formal content lock approval; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains a Human Gate.
Preserve M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS; no release-readiness claim is made.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no implementation or blocking research is authorized.
risks: Downstream M7 content, culture, balance, platform, save, playthrough, and exit tasks remain independent R4-sensitive work.
Formal content lock remains unapproved until explicit product-owner Human Gate approval.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, close M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001, then continue to the next dependency-ready M7 task.
